mapper.update: UPDATE dish SET name=#{name},category_id=#{categoryId},price=#{price},image=#{image}, description=#{description},status=#{status},flavor_json=#{flavorJson}, update_time=#{updateTime} WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0

UPDATE dish SET name=#{name},category_id=#{categoryId},price=#{price},image=#{image}, description=#{description},status=#{status},flavor_json=#{flavorJson}, update_time=#{updateTime},version=version+1 WHERE id=#{id} AND version=#{version} AND deleted=0
UPDATE dish SET deleted=1,update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM dish WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
